message.content:
Explore the CitedBy.ai SaaS app at C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie. I need to understand the full architecture for adding major new features. Thoroughness: very thorough.

Specifically investigate:
1. App.tsx - the full routing system (currentView union type, all view names, how navigation works)
2. The sidebar structure - all sections (PRINCIPAL, OUTILS, GESTION), all NavItem entries
3. The command palette entries
4. The breadcrumb system
5. How pages receive props (user, onDeductCredits, onNavigate, onBack patterns)
6. The existing Monitoring AEO page - what does it currently do?
7. The Dashboard page - what data does it display?
8. The credits/billing system (GTO Gas, Recharge.tsx)
9. How existing tool pages (like EeatBuilder, AnswerFirstAudit) structure their forms and results

Return detailed findings including file paths, line numbers, and code snippets for key patterns.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration of the CitedBy.ai SaaS app architecture. Let me start by examining the directory structure and key files.

input.command: find "C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie" -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.json" | head -50
